en.name: Chimp Test
en.desc: Can you beat a chimpanzee at memory? Remember the positions of numbers 1-9 in order, then click them from memory. Most chimps outperform humans!

zh.name: 黑猩猩测试
zh.desc: 你能在记忆力上打败黑猩猩吗？记住1-9数字的位置顺序，然后凭记忆点击它们。大多数黑猩猩都胜过人类！
zh.howToPlay: Numbers flash briefly on screen. After they disappear, click the squares in order from 1 to 9. Get them all right to advance to higher levels with more numbers.
tips: Use chunking - group numbers into patterns
Stay calm and focused during the flash
Practice to improve your working memory capacity
